base_model_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the base model used to create the custom model.

creation_time.description: The timestamp indicating when the custom model was created.

hyperparameters.description: A set of key-value pairs representing the hyperparameters used in the model training.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the custom model.

job_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the training job associated with the custom model.

job_name.description: The name of the training job used to create the custom model.

job_tags.description: Tags associated with the training job for categorization or organization.

model_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the deployed custom model.

model_kms_key_arn.description: The ARN of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the model.

model_name.description: The name assigned to the custom model.

model_tags.description: Tags associated with the custom model for categorization or organization.

output_data_config.description: Configuration details of the S3 bucket where the model's output data is stored.

training_data_config.description: Configuration details of the S3 bucket containing the training data.

training_metrics.description: Metrics related to the model's training performance, such as training loss.

validation_data_config.description: Configuration details of the S3 bucket containing the validation data.

validation_metrics.description: Metrics related to the model's validation performance, such as validation loss.
